Forbidden.description: Access token is missing or invalid

Any.description: Any JSON object not defined as schema

get.summary: Get a single instance of servers (show)
Get a single instance of categories (show)
Get stats for a single server (index)

parameters.name: exactTime
parameters.description: Point-in-time lookup as epoch milliseconds (or the literal string `now`). Returns the row at that timestamp, or an averaged interpolation between the nearest before/after rows.

parameters.name: fromDate
parameters.description: Start of range as epoch milliseconds (or the literal string `now`). Required if neither interval nor exactTime is provided.

parameters.name: toDate
parameters.description: End of range as epoch milliseconds (or the literal string `now`).

parameters.name: interval
parameters.description: Bucket size for aggregation. When provided, stats are grouped per bucket. Allowed values: `30 minutes`, `1 hour`, `2 hours`, `6 hours`, `1 day`, `1 week` (URL-encode the space, e.g. `interval=1%20hour`).

properties.error: fromDate (or interval) is required when fetching raw stats — refusing to scan the full table

example.error: fromDate (or interval) is required when fetching raw stats — refusing to scan the full table

get.summary: Get aggregated global stats across all servers (globalStats)

parameters.name: fromDate
parameters.description: Start of range as epoch milliseconds (or the literal string `now`).

parameters.name: toDate
parameters.description: End of range as epoch milliseconds (or the literal string `now`).

parameters.name: interval
parameters.description: Bucket size for aggregation. Allowed values: `30 minutes`, `1 hour`, `2 hours`, `6 hours`, `1 day`, `1 week` (URL-encode the space, e.g. `interval=1%20hour`).

parameters.name: categoryId
parameters.description: Restrict aggregation to servers in this category.

parameters.name: languageId
parameters.description: Restrict aggregation to servers in this language.

get.summary: Get a single instance of users (show)

post.description:
Authenticates a user using email and password credentials. Returns the user object and a newly created access token on success. Rejects unverified accounts and accounts that were registered via a third-party OAuth provider.

 _app/controllers/auth_controller.ts_ - **login**

properties.message: The email field must be a valid email address

errors.message: The email field must be a valid email address

post.description:
Creates a new user (unverified), generates a JWT email verification token and queues a verification email via the mail service. Returns the created user. The account remains unverified until verifyEmail is called.

 _app/controllers/auth_controller.ts_ - **register**

properties.message: The email field must be a valid email address

errors.message: The email field must be a valid email address

post.description:
Validates a JWT verification token previously sent by email, marks the matching user as verified, and clears the stored verification token and its expiry.

 _app/controllers/auth_controller.ts_ - **verifyEmail**

properties.message: The token field must be defined

errors.message: The token field must be defined

post.description:
Sends a password reset link to the account matching the given email, when one exists. To prevent account enumeration the endpoint always returns the same 200 response whether or not an account was found. A reset link is only sent for verified, non-OAuth accounts; the emailed token is high-entropy and only its hash is stored server-side, expiring after 1 hour.

 _app/controllers/auth_controller.ts_ - **forgotPassword**

properties.message: If an account matches this email, a password reset link has been sent.

example.message: If an account matches this email, a password reset link has been sent.

properties.message: The email field must be a valid email address

errors.message: The email field must be a valid email address

post.summary: Reset a password using an emailed token (resetPassword)
post.description:
Validates the reset token from the emailed link (matched against the stored hash and its 1-hour expiry), sets the new password, clears the token so it cannot be reused, and revokes every existing session of the account. Invalid and expired tokens return the same generic error to avoid leaking token state.

 _app/controllers/auth_controller.ts_ - **resetPassword**

properties.message: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in.

example.message: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in.

properties.message: This password reset link is invalid or has expired.

example.message: This password reset link is invalid or has expired.

properties.message: The password field must have at least 8 characters

errors.message: The password field must have at least 8 characters

post.description:
Updates the password of the currently authenticated user after verifying the old password. Requires authentication and a verified email. Not usable for accounts created via a third-party provider that have no usable password.

 _app/controllers/auth_controller.ts_ - **changePassword**

properties.message: The newPassword field must have at least 8 characters

errors.message: The newPassword field must have at least 8 characters

post.description:
Updates the display username of the currently authenticated user. Usernames are not unique. Requires authentication. Returns the updated user (including their own email).

 _app/controllers/auth_controller.ts_ - **changeUsername**

properties.message: The username field must have at least 3 characters

errors.message: The username field must have at least 3 characters

post.description:
Accepts a multipart upload under the form field `avatar` (max 5 MB, extensions `jpg`, `jpeg`, `png`, `webp`, `gif`). The image is converted to a 256x256 WebP, stored via Drive, and its relative URL is saved on the user. Returns the updated user. Requires authentication.

 _app/controllers/auth_controller.ts_ - **updateAvatar**

post.summary: Log out of the current session (logout)
post.description:
Revokes the access token presented on this request, invalidating only the current session server-side. Requires authentication.

 _app/controllers/auth_controller.ts_ - **logout**

post.summary: Revoke all sessions (log out of every device) (logoutAll)
post.description:
Revokes every access token of the authenticated user, including the current one, signing them out on all devices. Useful after a suspected compromise. Requires authentication.

 _app/controllers/auth_controller.ts_ - **logoutAll**

get.summary: List the authenticated user's API tokens (index)

properties.message: The name field must be defined

errors.message: The name field must be defined

delete.description:
Permanently revokes one of the authenticated user's API tokens by id. Only named API tokens can be revoked through this endpoint.

 _app/controllers/api_tokens_controller.ts_ - **destroy**

get.summary: Start an OAuth login flow with a third-party provider (providerLogin)
get.description:
Issues an HTTP redirect to the chosen OAuth provider's authorization URL. The provider will redirect back to the corresponding callback endpoint (googleCallback or discordCallback) once the user has approved or denied access.

get.summary: Get a single instance of admin (show)

post.description:
Accepts a multipart upload under the form field `image`. The file is validated (max 5 MB, extensions `jpg`, `jpeg`, `png`, `webp`, `gif`), converted to WebP at quality 85, resized to fit within 1920x1080 without enlargement, and stored in `public/images/blog/`. Returns the relative URL of the stored image. Requires authentication and `manage` ability on the Post policy.

 _app/controllers/uploads_controller.ts_ - **uploadImage**
